_comment: SHIP CARDS - One entry per flyable ship (both factions). Loaded by CardBuilder.java -> ShipCard.java. Fields: ShipObjectKey (unique ship model ID), Level/MaxLevel (upgrade range), HangarID (position in hangar UI), LevelRequirement (min player level to fly), Durability (total ship HP before systems break), Tier (1=strike, 2=escort, 3=line, 4=capital), ShipRoles (ShipRole.java enum: Interceptor/Fighter/Assault/Command/etc.), ShipRoleDeprecated (legacy role from ShipRoleDeprecated.java), Slots (array of ShipSlotCard: SlotId, ObjectPoint, SystemType=weapon/hull/engine/computer), Stats (ObjectStats wrapper: {stats: {MaxHullPoints, Speed, Armor, etc.}} - keys are ObjectStat.java enum names), Faction (Colonial or Cylon), nextShipCardGuid (GUID of Advanced variant, 0 if none). Data source: Exodus Excel spreadsheet (ship stats) + Assembly-CSharp.decompiled.cs (names/tiers).
